ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-17-2012 IN 503, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE WAS HEARD AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: MOTION IS GRANTED PER C.C.P. 36(A). TRIAL IS AUGUST 13, 2012 AT 11:15AM IN DEPARTMENT 503. LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY MOTIONS IS AUGUST 2. ALL SUMMARY MOTIONS TO BE FILED ON REGULAR NOTICES. RESPONSES TO ALL SPECIAL DISCOVERY WILL BE DUE ON 20 DAYS NOTICE. PLAINTIFF'S REDACTED WORK DIARY TO BE PRODUCED TO DEFENDANTS IN 10 DAYS FROM THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF WILL PROVIDE THE BANKRUPTCY CLAIM FORMS SUBMITTED IN THIS ACTION TO DEFENDANTS BY JULY 18, 2012. PLAINTIFFS TO MAKE A SETTLEMENT DEMAND ON ALL DEFENDANTS NO LATER THAN JULY 16, 2012. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN ROOM 603 AT 1:30PM ON AUGUST 2, 2012. FACT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS JULY 27, 2012. EXPERT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS AUGUST 10, 2012. NO LATER THAN MAY 11, 2012, PLAINTIFFS MUST PROVIDE A STATEMENT STATING, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT, THE NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION OF EACH PERSON WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY FACTS SUPPORTING ANY OF PLAINTIFFS' CLAIMS. NO LATER THAN MAY 11, 2012, DEFENDANTS MUST PROVIDE A STATEMENT STATING THE NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION OF EACH PERSON WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY FACTS SUPPORTING ANY OF DEFENDANT'S AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. ANY PERSON NOT IDENTIFIED ON THE STATEMENTS WILL BE BARRED FROM TESTIFYING AT TRIAL OR PRESENTING A DECLARATION ON A SUMMARY MOTION ABSENT GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. THE PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING ANY OTHER SCHEDULING OR OTHER ISSUE WHICH ANY OF THEM WANT TO HAVE INCLUDED IN THE PREFERENCE ORDER. FURTHER CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JULY 18, 2012 AT 1:30PM. NO NEED FOR ANY PARTY TO FILE ANY CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENT. PARTIES MAY APPEAR AT THE CONFERENCE BY TELEPHONE. THERE WILL BE A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH THE COURT PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULES OF COURT RULE 5. ALL COUNSEL ATTENDING THE CONFERENCE MUST HAVE KNOWLEDGE ABOUT THE FACT OF THE CASE, AND BE PRESENT WITH THE REPRESENTATIVES WHO HAVE AUTHORITY TO SETTLE. (CONT'D)

(CONT'D) ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-17-2012 IN 503, ANY PERSON(S) NEED TO APPEAR BY PHONE MUST SEEK APPROVAL BY THE COURT PRIOR TO THE CONFERENCE. THE DATE OF THIS CONFERENCE WILL BE DETERMINED BY THE COURT. THE PARTIES SHALL COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 5.0 REGARDING THE SUBMISSION OF SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENTS.
